description: A leg is the lower limb extending from the hip to the foot. It supports standing and carries bodily movement; 'kunoa' (knee) is its central joint and 'paloi' (foot) the part that meets the ground.
articulatory_notes: Place the tongue tip against the backs of the upper teeth for unvoiced dental 't' and release into middle-height back rounded 'o'. Touch the tongue tip to the alveolar ridge for voiced 'l', let air pass along its sides, and open into stressed central unrounded 'a'. Move the tongue forward into middle-height unrounded 'e' for the separate final syllable.

semantic_domains.physical: a lower limb used for support and movement
